textract_queries.Text: How many votes did Samuel Muchina Nyagah of United Democratic Alliance receive?
How many votes did Sammy Kamau Ngotho of Democracy for the Citizens Party receive?
How many votes did Wilson Kigwa of Jubilee Party receive?
How many votes did Edwin Muchiri of Party of National Unity receive?
How many votes did Rachel Wangui Njoroge of People's Democratic Party receive?
How many votes did Mathenge Mwaniki of Kenya Moja Movement receive?
How many votes did Abdifatah Hussein of Federal Party of Kenya receive?
How many votes did Timothy Kamau of People's Renaissance Party receive?
How many votes did Stephen Wanyoike of National Liberal Party receive?
How many registered voters does this polling station have?
How many rejected votes were recorded?
What is the total number of valid votes?
What is the total number of votes cast?

notes: Field NAMES below are real (all 9 actual Ol Kalou candidates, from data/reference/candidates.json). Every COORDINATE is the sentinel [0,0,0,0] -- deliberately invalid, not measured. ocr/preprocess.py's enhanced_crop() raises on a zero-size crop, and prepare_rois() separately refuses to run unless status == 'VERIFIED'. Both stay engaged with this file as-is.

To calibrate: get a real scanned Form 35A (2022 Ol Kalou, or the Emurua Dikirr dress-rehearsal corpus -- same portal, same era, same layout), set reference_size to its [width, height], and either measure each field's [x,y,width,height] by hand in an image editor, or run scripts/suggest_roi_template.py for an assisted starting guess that still requires visual verification before it can be trusted.
Do not set status to VERIFIED until every coordinate has actually been checked against the real form. This file controls what the OCR pipeline reads on election night.
